data.body: PASS 1 review (T3 — Integration feasibility overlay): NOT-APPLICABLE / PASS for Cluster 1. The plan integrates no external API/CLI/service/library and asserts no previously-unused capability — it extends an existing internal module (src/rebar/_store/canonical.py, confirmed present) and migrates internal callers onto it using only stdlib json/hashlib already in use across the repo. Per the overlay's gating clause and ANTI-FP note ("an internal, already-used integration is not-applicable"), no findings. No SPIKE warranted.
